dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No transcripts exist yet - zero teaching moments to evaluate.
opportunities: Record and publish your first video teaching one core belief from your IP.
Define your transformation in the onboarding flow so future videos can ladder to it.
Pick one audience pain point from your positioning and build a tutorial around it.

dimensions.label: Authority
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: Brag bank is empty and no videos contain proof points.
opportunities: Add at least 5 specific wins with dates and numbers to your brag bank.
Script a proof moment into your next video using one real client result.
Record a case-study video walking through one measurable outcome you delivered.

dimensions.label: Point of View
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: Only one example POV exists and no videos argue it.
opportunities: Write 5 real contrarian stances you hold about your industry into the POV bank.
Build your next video around one POV - name the common belief then argue against it.
Add a 60-second POV rant segment as a repeatable block in every video script.

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No origin story or micro-stories recorded - nothing personal to retell.
opportunities: Fill in your origin story via the onboarding flow on the Profile page.
Write 3 specific micro-stories from your journey into the confirmed stories bank.
Open your first video with a vulnerable 30-second moment from your own experience.
